name: Richmond Bonded Leather Storage Ottoman Espresso: Coffee Table & Seating - Christopher Knight Home
description: The Christopher Knight Home Richmond Espresso Bonded Leather Storage Ottoman has great functionality and beautiful presence. It offers rich leather exterior with a large storage space interior for all of your needs. Use the internal storage to keep games, blankets, or anything you want out of the way. Place it in front of your sofa as a place to put your feet up on after a long day or off to the side to provide extra seating for your guests. This multifunctional Christopher Knight Home Richmond Espresso Bonded Leather Storage Ottoman is a must have piece.
